reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: An attacker can trigger this via on-chain blob transactions by submitting multiple blob transactions whose cumulative blob gas exceeds MAX_BLOB_GAS_PER_BLOCK, causing the block executor to produce invalid blocks that violate consensus rules and will be rejected by compliant nodes. All 3 FP gates passed: function has active callers (Gate 1), entry point is untrusted transactions (Gate 2), and finding is in-scope for Fusaka blob transaction validation (Gate 3). Severity remains Medium as this affects consensus validation for implementations using this code.
